scripts.dev:renderer+packages: concurrently -n renderer,ts -c green,yellow "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run watch:ts"
scripts.dev: npm run build:ts:dev && concurrently -n ts,renderer,web -c yellow,green,blue "npm run watch:ts" "npm run dev:renderer" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:ts && npm run build:web
scripts.start:prod: concurrently -n web,renderer -c blue,green "npm run start:web" "npm run start:renderer"
